[Citi Foundation](https://www.citigroup.com/global/foundation)

![](https://www.citigroup.com/rcs/v1/siteIds/citigpa/asset/69974b0eae75e054fb9daea0.jpg)

# Citi Foundation Launches New Five-Year Effort to Address Housing Affordability in the U.S.

Starting with a $1 million grant to the Center for Affordable Housing Lending.

[Learn more](https://www.citigroup.com/global/our-impact/strengthening-community/housing-affordability)

![](https://www.citigroup.com/rcs/v1/siteIds/citigpa/asset/635fcdb6bedda3289350429b.jpg)

## We partner with community organizations working across 80+ countries and territories globally.

[Learn More](https://www.citigroup.com/global/foundation/about-us/philanthropic-focus)

## OUR WORK

We invest in efforts that increase financial inclusion, catalyze job opportunities for youth, and reimagine approaches to building economically vibrant communities.

[Our Team](https://www.citigroup.com/global/foundation/about-us/people)

[Programs](https://www.citigroup.com/global/foundation/programs)

[Funding Approach](https://www.citigroup.com/rcs/citigpa/storage/public/Citi_Foundation_Funding_Approach_Feb2026.pdf)

[Reports & Resources](https://www.citigroup.com/global/foundation/knowledge-center/reports-and-resources)
